card.name: Time Dilate
card.text: Take an extra turn after this one, then exile this spell. Flashback {U} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Gitaxian Research
card.text: Surveil 5 (Look at the top five cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Aftershock
card.text: Deal 3 damage to any target. Whenever an opponent casts their second spell each turn, you may cast this spell from your graveyard without paying it's mana cost.

card.name: Stone Downpour
card.text: Destroy all nonbasic lands.

card.name: Enclosure Priest
card.text: If a land would enter the battlefield and it wasn't played, exile it instead.

card.name: Kor Wayshaper
card.text: When this creature enters, each player sacrifices a land.

card.name: Hogaak, the Unending
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Trample, deathtouch Whenever Hogaak leaves your graveyard, you may put it onto the battlefield.

card.name: Archon of the Spheres
card.text: Flying, vigilance, lifelink Whenever a nonland permanent would enter under an opponents control, if that player had three or more other nonland permanents enter this turn, exile it instead.

card.name: Scion of Karn
card.text: When you cast this spell, copy it for each artifact you control. Whenever this creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Alhammarret's Intuition
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Your opponents can't draw more than one card each turn. If you would draw one or more cards, you draw that many plus one instead.

card.name: Temur Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}, {U}, or {R}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Sultai Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}, {G}, or {U}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Mardu Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}, {W}, or {B}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Jeskai Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}, {R}, or {W}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Abzan Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}, {B}, or {G}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Tibalt, Cruel Sadist
card.text: When Tibalt enters, create a 1/1 red devil creature token with "When this creature dies, it deals 1 damage to any target." Whenever Tibalt is dealt damage and survives, you may exile him, then return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control. --- (Back): Tibalt, Paincursed

card.name: Tibalt, Paincursed
card.text: --- (Front): Tibalt, Cruel Sadist

card.name: Recast
card.text: Exile target noncreature nonland card from your graveyard, you may cast it without paying its mana cost. If it's a permanent it enters with a finality counter on it, otherwise, exile it as it resolves.

card.name: Storm Fiend
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. Copies become tokens.)

card.name: Prayer to Sveylun
card.text: Choose one — • Counter target noncreature spell. • Draw 2 cards. You may exile a blue card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Prayer to Rhonas
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target artifact or enchantment • Target player puts all cards from their graveyard on the bottom of their library in a random order. You may exile a green card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Prayer to Purphuros
card.text: Choose one — • Each player discards their hand then draws 5 cards. • Deal 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker. You may exile a red card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Prayer to Egon
card.text: Choose one — • Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. • Target player discards two cards at random. You may exile a black card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Prayer to Avacyn
card.text: Choose one — • Artifacts and creatures you control gain hexproof and indestructible until end of turn. • Target opponent can't cast spells this turn. You may exile a white card from your hand rather than pay this spells mana cost.

card.name: Grixis Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {U}, {B}, or {R}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Esper Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {W}, {U}, or {B}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Naya Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {R}, {G}, or {W}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Bant Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {G}, {W}, or {U}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Jund Triome
card.text: ({T}: Add {B}, {R}, or {G}) When this land becomes tapped, you lose 1 life.

card.name: Mox Pyrite
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {W}.

card.name: Mox Charcoal
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {R}.

card.name: Mox Bismuth
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Mox Roselite
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {R} or {G}.

card.name: Mox Quartz
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {B}.

card.name: Mox Amethyst
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {B} or {G}.

card.name: Mox Obsidian
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {B}.

card.name: Mox Topaz
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {W}.

card.name: Mox Turquoise
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {W} or {U}.

card.name: Mox Tourmaline
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {U} or {R}.

card.name: Dredge the Depths
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Mill five cards, then you may return a permanent card from among them to your hand.

card.name: From the Grave
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield, you lose life equal to its power. Flashback {B} (You may cast this card from your graveyard for its flashback cost. Then exile it.)

card.name: Phyrexian Gladiator
card.text: Menace When this creature enters, target player draws a card and lose 1 life. Swampcycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Fomori Rallier
card.text: Exile this card from your graveyard: Target creature must block this turn if able. Mountaincycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Simian Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {R}.

card.name: Elvish Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {G}.

card.name: Merrow Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {U}.

card.name: Skeletal Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {B}.

card.name: Angelic Spirit Guide
card.text: Exile this card from your hand: Add {W}.

card.name: Mana Warp
card.text: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Birgi's Harbinger
card.text: When this creature enters, add two mana of any one color.

card.name: Polymorphist's Caravan
card.text: When this artifact enters create a 1/1 Illusion creature token. When this vehicle attacks, sacrifice a creature that crewed it this turn, when you do, reveal card from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card. Put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle. Crew 1

card.name: Immutable Plans
card.text: Whenever you cast an instant spell during your main phase, copy it, you may choose new targets for the copy.

card.name: Stormclaw Warsinger
card.text: Blitz {B}{R} (If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and "When this creature dies, draw a card". Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.) Whenever a creature you control dies, if it attacked this turn, create a Treasure token, then if it entered this turn, create another Treasure token.

card.name: Gate of Benedictions
card.text: Whenever you cast this spell or another spell for its miracle cost, reveal the top card of your library, if it has miracle you may cast it for its miracle cost, otherwise put it into your hand. Miracle {0} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Dark Blessing
card.text: Search your library for a card, and put it into your hand, then shuffle. You lose 2 life. Miracle {B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Hectos, Titan of Mana's Roil
card.text: When Hectos enters, sacrifice it unless it escaped. Whenever Hectos enters or attacks, search your library for a land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Escape—{G}{G}{W}{W}, Exile five other cards from your graveyard.

card.name: Tempus, Titan of Time's Ruin
card.text: When Tempus enters, sacrifice it unless it escaped. Whenever Tempus enters or attacks, target player reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it. That player discards that card. You lose 2 life. Escape—{U}{U}{B}{B}, Exile five other cards from your graveyard.

card.name: Griselbrand, Unsealed
card.text: Flying, lifelink When Griselbrand enters, exile the top seven cards of each players library face down. You may look at cards exiled with Griselbrand and may play lands and cast spells from among them without paying their mana cost.

card.name: Stormbrain
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn. Copies become tokens.) When this creature enters, draw three cards, then put two cards from your hand on top of your library in any order.

card.name: Ashiok, Dream Seeker
card.text: {T}: Draw a card, then discard a card, then exile the top card of your library with a dream counter on it. Then if you own four or more cards in exile, you may exile Ashiok, then return them to the battlefield transformed under their owner's control. --- (Back): Ashiok, Nightmare Born

card.name: Ashiok, Nightmare Born
card.text: --- (Front): Ashiok, Dream Seeker

card.name: Calix, Fate-Sworn
card.text: When Calix or another enchantment you control enters, you draw a card and gain a life. Whenever another enchantment you control leaves the battlefield, you may exile Calix then return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control. --- (Back): Calix, Fate-Bound

card.name: Calix, Fate-Bound
card.text: --- (Front): Calix, Fate-Sworn

card.name: Narset, Ojutai's Faithful
card.text: Whenever you cast a historic spell, scry 1. Then you may reveal the top card of your library. If a historic card is revealed this way, you may exile Narset, then return her to the battlefield tapped under her owner's control. (Artifacts, legendaries, and Sagas are historic.) --- (Back): Narset, Eyes Opened

card.name: Narset, Eyes Opened
card.text: --- (Front): Narset, Ojutai's Faithful

card.name: Ulamog's Wake
card.text: Whenever one or more cards you own are put into exile from anywhere other than the battlefield, put a defile counter on each of them. {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Choose a card you own in exile with a defile counter on it, you may play it this turn.

card.name: Blind Echoes
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell, if no mana was spent to cast it, draw a card.

card.name: Mark of Oblivion
card.text: Eerie — Whenever this enchantment or another enchantment you control enters and whenever you fully unlock a room, exile target nonland permanent until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Mage-Ring Guard
card.text: Whenever this card leaves your graveyard, add {U}. Islandcycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Stone Guardian
card.text: Flying Whenever you attack, target attacking creature gains flying until end of turn. Plainscycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: World Ooze's Trail
card.text: Deathtouch When this creature enters, destroy target artifact, enchantment, or nonbasic land. Forestcycling {0} ({0}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Bring Back
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Sylvan Guardian
card.text: Whenever a land is put into your graveyard from anywhere, target creature you control gains hexproof until end of turn. {1}, {T}, Sacrifice a land: Search your library for a land and put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Consulate Informant
card.text: This creature can't be blocked. When this creature deals combat damage to a player, draw a card then discard a card.

card.name: Windswept Heath
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Polluted Delta
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Misty Rainforest
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Forest or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Scalding Tarn
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for an Island or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Arid Mesa
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Plains card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Bloodstained Mire
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Mountain card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Flooded Strand
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Island card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Marsh Flats
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Plains or Swamp card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Wooded Foothills
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Mountain or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Verdant Catacombs
card.text: {T}, Pay 1 life, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a Swamp or Forest card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Shell Shock
card.text: Exile target creature that entered this turn, its controller gains 3 life.

card.name: Manachaser
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, copy target instant or sorcery spell you control. If no mana was spent to cast that spell, copy it an additional time.

card.name: Overwhelming Will
card.text: Return any number of target spells to their owners hands. Draw a card for each spell returned this way.

card.name: Storm Strike
card.text: Deal 1 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If you've cast another spell this turn, this spell deals 3 damage to the chosen target instead.

card.name: Verdant Overflow
card.text: Search your library for two land cards and put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

card.name: Wild Ritual
card.text: Untap target land, until end of turn, whenever that land is tapped for mana, its controlled adds three times that much mana instead.

card.name: Bloodrage
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield, it gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step. Whenever that creature is dealt damage this turn, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Sanctum of Eternity
card.text: Whenever another enchantment you control enters, untap all basic lands you control.

card.name: Living Leyline
card.text: If this enchantment is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with it on the battlefield. Artifact and enchantment spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Dismember
card.text: Target creature gets -5/-5 until end of turn.

card.name: Prohibit
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {1}.

card.name: Engulf
card.text: Deal 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: Corrode
card.text: Exile target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: Banish
card.text: Put target creature into its owner's library third from the top.

card.name: Muldrotha, Rotbloom
card.text: As long as Muldrotha is in your graveyard and there are 5 or more cards in your graveyard, you may play lands and cast permanent spells from your graveyard. Dredge 3 (If you would draw a card, you may mill three cards instead. If you do, return this card from your graveyard to your hand.)

card.name: Avishkari Gearsmith
card.text: You may pay 1 life and exile a colorless card from your hand rather than pay the mana cost of artifact spells you cast.

card.name: Rotting Baloth
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Trample This creature enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each card you own in exile.

card.name: Dig for Answers
card.text: Delve (Each card you exile from your graveyard while casting this spell pays for {1}.) Draw three cards then discard a card.

card.name: Karn, Father of Machines
card.text: Trample, Toxic 10 (Players dealt combat damage by this creature also get ten poison counters.) When Karn dies or is put into exile from the battlefield, you may put an artifact or creature card from your hand onto the battlefield.

card.name: Forced Prayer
card.text: The first card you draw each turn has miracle {2} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.) Whenever you cast a spell for its miracle cost, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Ring of Stars
card.text: This artifact enters tapped. {T}: Add {C}{C}.

card.name: Thran Dragon Engine
card.text: Flying Whenever this creature or another nonland permanent you control enters, you may discard a card, if you do, draw a card.

card.name: Monoist Mutilator
card.text: When this creature enters or dies, destroy target creature, its controller creates a food token.

card.name: Bloodsoaked Lotus
card.text: Morbid — {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Add three mana of any one color. Activate this ability only if a creature died this turn.

card.name: Immersturm Conqueror
card.text: Flash When this creature enters, it deals 3 damage to each creature that attacked this turn. Create a Treasure token for each creature that dies this way.

card.name: Nyxbloom Prodigy
card.text: Forests you control have "{T}: Add {G}{G}."

card.name: Xenagos, Violent Hedonist
card.text: Whenever Xenagos or another creature you control enters, Xenagos deals 1 damage to each opponent. Then if three or more creatures entered under your control this turn, you may exile Xenagos, then return him to the battlefield transformed under his owner's control. --- (Back): Xenagos, King Stranger

card.name: Xenagos, King Stranger
card.text: --- (Front): Xenagos, Violent Hedonist

card.name: Black Lotus
card.text: {T}: Sacrifice this artifact: Add three mana of any one color.

card.name: Mind Accelerant
card.text: Draw a card, if you've cast another spell this turn, draw three cards instead.

card.name: Voltaic Gambit
card.text: Exile the top three cards of your library, you may play them this turn. Whenever you cast your fourth spell this turn, add {R}{R}{R}{R}{R}.

card.name: Endless Windfall
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.) Create a Treasure token.

card.name: Violent Twister
card.text: Each player exiles their hand and graveyard, then draws seven cards, then exile this spell.

card.name: Precognize
card.text: Draw a card, then surveil 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them into your graveyard and the rest on top of your library in any order.)

card.name: Divine Respondent
card.text: Flying You may cast spells you draw with miracle for their miracle cost if they're the second or third card you draw each turn. Miracle {W} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Xerex Paragon
card.text: Flying, flash When this creature enters, exile target artifact, creature or planeswalker, its controller gains life equal to its mana value. Miracle {W} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Shards of Alara
card.text: This land enters tapped. As this land enters, choose three different colors. {T}, Pay 1 life: Add one mana of any of the chosen colors.

card.name: Improper Burial
card.text: Put target creature card from a graveyard onto the battlefield under your control. It becomes a 1/1 black zombie in addition to its other colors and types.

card.name: Glasspool Rehearsal
card.text: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control except its an illusion in addition to its other types and has "When this creature becomes the target of a spell, sacrifice it."

card.name: Kappa Artillerist
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) Whenever another artifact you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature and draw a card.

card.name: The Spirit Gem
card.text: When this artifact enters, search your library for up to two land cards and put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Spells you cast cost {W}{U}{B}{R}{G} less to cast, this effect reduces only the amount of colored mana you pay. Whenever a land you control becomes tapped for mana, add {C}.

card.name: Phyrexian Therapy
card.text: Choose a nonland card name, then target player reveals their hand and discards all cards with that name. Draw a card.

card.name: Orb Caretaker
card.text: Sacrifice a land: Gain 3 life.

card.name: Remnant of Titania
card.text: Whenever a land is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, create a 3/3 green Elemental creature token.

card.name: Marit Lage's Prison
card.text: This land enters with twelve ice counters on it. At the beginning of each upkeep, remove an ice counter from this land, then if it has no ice counters on it, sacrifice it. When this land is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, create Marit Lage, a legendary 20/20 black Avatar creature token with flying and indestructible.

card.name: Marit Lage VIN
card.text: Flying, Indestructible

card.name: Thaneborn Miracle
card.text: At the beginning of each opponent's upkeep, you draw a card and lose a life.

card.name: Rune Blesser
card.text: {T}: Another target creature or planeswalker you control gains protection from colorless or the color of your choice until end of turn. (This creature can't be blocked, targeted, dealt damage, enchanted, or equipped by anything colorless or of that color until end of turn.)

card.name: Razia, Boros Parun
card.text: Flying, vigilance, haste Whenever Razia attacks, it deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: Brisela, Twisted Savior
card.text: Devoid (This card has no color.) Flying, Vigilance Spells you cast during your opponent's turn cost {2} less to cast. Spells your opponent's cast during your turn cost {2} more to cast.

card.name: Liesa, Wish Granter
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast this spell or another spell, if the amount of mana spent to cast that spell was less than its mana value, you gain 3 life and draw a card. Miracle {1}{W}{B} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Koma, Compleated
card.text: As Koma enters, create three 3/3 blue Phyrexian Serpent creature tokens named Koma's Coil. Whenever another creature you control dies, put two +1/+1 counters on Koma.

card.name: Jori En, Relic Hunter
card.text: Magecraft — Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, draw a card. The second spell you cast each turn costs {2} less to cast.

card.name: Karametra, Bloom-Crowned
card.text: Indestructible As long as your devotion to green and white is less than seven, Karametra isn't a creature. Enchantment spells you cast cost {G}{G}{W}{W} less to cast. This effect reduces only the amount of colored mana you pay.

card.name: Winter, Slave to Valgavoth
card.text: Lifelink Whenever Winter attacks, draw a card, then you may discard a card, if you do Winter can't be blocked this turn. Whenever you discard a nonland card, put a +1/+1 counter in Winter.

card.name: Akul, the Scourge
card.text: Flying, trample Sacrifice a nontoken creature: Put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield, it gains haste until end of turn. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Ulasht, Writhing Hybrid
card.text: Ulasht enters with a +1/+1 counter on it for each land you control and each land card in your graveyard. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Ulasht, it gains trample until end of turn

card.name: Llanowar Dryad
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Growth Tender
card.text: When this creature enters, return target nonland card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Bury
card.text: Search your library for a card and put it into your graveyard, then shuffle.

card.name: Setessan Nyxweaver
card.text: Whenever you cast an enchantment spell, draw a card.

card.name: Fear of Losing Control
card.text: Bestow {G} (If you cast this card for its bestow cost, it's an Aura spell with enchant creature. It becomes a creature again if it's not attached.) Enchanted creature gets +2/+2 and attacks each combat if able.

card.text: {T}: Add {W} for each artifact and/or enchantment you control.

card.name: Yawgmoth's Bastion
card.text: {T}: Add {B} for each card in your graveyard.

card.name: Strixhaven, School of Mages
card.text: {T}: Add {U} for each spell you've cast or copied this turn.

card.name: Evendo, Terraformed
card.text: {T}: Add {G} for each other land you control.

card.text: {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Wickerfolk Tiller
card.text: You may play land cards from your graveyard. Landfall — Whenever a land you control enters, this creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn.

card.name: Final Charge
card.text: Creature cards in your hand have blitz {1}{R} (If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and "When this creature dies, draw a card". Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.) Whenever a creature you control dies, create a tapped Treasure token.

card.name: Riveteer's Beatdown
card.text: The next creature spell you cast this turn costs {R} to cast. Whenever you cast your next creature spell this turn, it gains haste, sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Detective's Study // Empty Prison
card.text:
When you unlock this door, destroy target creature, its controller investigates.

{2}: Return all creature cards exiled with this enchantment to the battlefield under their owners control, then exile target creature.

card.name: Ritual of Unmaking
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, pay X life. Target creature gets -X/-X until end of turn.

card.name: Mana Harvester
card.text: Lands you control have "{T}: Draw a card."

card.name: Green Sun's Avatar
card.text: Pay 1 life: Add {G}. {15}, {T}: Each player's life total become equal to the number of creatures they control.

card.name: Red Sun's Avatar
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. Whenever you sacrifice an artifact. sacrifice this creature.

card.name: Blue Sun's Avatar
card.text: Flash Whenever an opponent draws a card other than the first one they draw during each of their draw steps, draw a card.

card.name: White Sun's Avatar
card.text: Whenever you cast your first spell each turn, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Miracle {W} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Black Sun's Avatar
card.text: When this creature enters, surveil 2. When this creature dies, search your library for a card and put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Self-Duplicator
card.text: Replicate {2} (When you cast this spell, copy it for each time you paid its replicate cost.) When this creature enters, add one mana of any color.

card.name: Gelatinous Armor
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature gets +1/+1 has absorb 2 (If a source would deal damage to that creature, prevent 2 of that damage.)

card.name: Extraplanar Surveyor
card.text: Champion a land (When this creature enters, sacrifice it unless you exile another land you control. When this creature leaves the battlefield, that card returns to the battlefield.) Whenever you tap a land which shares a land type with the exiled card for mana, add an additional mana of any type that land produced.

card.name: Xenagos's Disciple
card.text: Tribute 2 (As this creature enters, an opponent of your choice may put two +1/+1 counters on it.) When this creature enters, if tribute wasn't payed, create two tapped Treasure tokens.

card.name: Swarm of Voidflies
card.text: Flying, devoid (This card has no color.) Ingest (Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, that player exiles the top card of their library.) When this creature enters, create a token that's a copy of it for each nonland card you own in exile.

card.name: Dryad Arbor
card.text: (This land isn't a spell, it's affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {G}.")

card.name: Jasconian Isle
card.text: (This land isn't a spell, it's affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {U}.")

card.name: Reed Strider
card.text: (This land isn't a spell, it's affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {W}.")

card.name: Marsh Fiend
card.text: (This land isn't a spell, it's affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {B}.")

card.name: Volcanic Remnant
card.text: (This land isn't a spell, it's affected by summoning sickness, and it has "{T}: Add {R}.")

card.name: Spectral Forgemaster
card.text: Flying Whenever you cast an artifact spell, create a 0/0 Construct artifact creature token with "This creature gets +1/+1 for each artifact you control." This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: Temporal Tempest
card.text: Storm (When you cast this spell, copy it for each spell cast before it this turn.) Take an extra turn after this one. At the beginning of your opponents next upkeep, you lose the game. Exile this spell.

card.name: Door to Duskmourn
card.text: As long as this artifact is tapped, creatures don't untap during their controllers untap step. {T}: Tap target creature.

card.name: Trostani's Advocate
card.text: Whenever this creature or another nontoken creature dies, populate. (Create a token that's a copy of a creature token you control.)

card.name: Arbor Awakener
card.text: Whenever an enchantment you control enters, draw a card. Lands you control are enchantments in addition to their other types.

card.name: Boughs of Paradise
card.text: Enchant land Whenever enchanted land is tapped for mana, add an additional {G}.

card.name: Night of Living Magic
card.text: Other noncreature enchantments you control are creatures with base power and toughness 3/3 in addition to their other types.

card.name: Perfect's Scout
card.text: Exile a card from your graveyard: If a land card is exiled this way, add {G}, if a creature card is exiled this way, create a 1/1 black and green Elf creature token, otherwise, each opponent loses a life. Activate this ability only once each turn.

card.name: Emry, Drowner of Fools
card.text: Affinity for artifacts (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each artifact you control.) Whenever an artifact you control enters, surveil 1 (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Hit the Flanks
card.text: Creatures you control have haste. Whenever a nontoken creature you control dies, create a 1/1 white soldier creature token.

card.name: Abbs of Steel
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control gains trample, indestructible, and "Whenever this creature is dealt damage, put a +1/+1 counter on it."

card.name: Giada, Nascent Seraph
card.text: Flying {T}: Add {W}, spend this mana only to cast creature spells. Miracle {W} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Souldrifter
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, exile seven cards from your graveyard. When this creature enters, draw two cards.

card.name: Oracle's Rebuff
card.text: Counter target spell unless its controller pays {3}. If they do, you may draw a card then discard a card.

card.name: Seasoned Inspector
card.text: When this creature enters, investigate twice. (To investigate, create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.")

card.name: Thraben Converter
card.text: Living weapon (When this Equipment enters, create a 0/0 black Phyrexian Germ creature token, then attach this to it.) Equipped creature gets +1/+1. Whenever equipped creature attacks, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw a card.") Equip {2}{W}

card.name: Siege Casket
Tocasia's Bauble
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Scry 1. Draw a card at the beginning of the next turns upkeep.

card.name: Ral's Prodigy
card.text: Magecraft — Whenever you cast or copy an instant or sorcery spell, this creature deals 1 damage to each opponent.

card.name: Gonti's Graverobber
card.text: When this creature enters, mill three cards. Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: Drain Essence
card.text: Choose one — • Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. • Exile up to one target card from a graveyard, draw a card.

card.name: Carrion Broker
card.text: When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. Whenever this creature or another creature you control dies, surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.)

card.name: Iterate
card.text: Exile the top card of your library, you may play it this turn. If you've cast another spell this turn, add {R}{R}.

card.name: Adrenaline Hellkite
card.text: Blitz {1}{R} (If you cast this spell for its blitz cost, it gains haste and "When this creature dies, draw a card". Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.) Flying When this creature dies, exile the top two cards of your library, you may play them until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Storm-Kiln Aspirant
card.text: Whenever you cast your second spell each turn, create a Treasure token. Whenever you cast your third spell each turn, this creature deals 2 damage to each opponent, Whenever you cast your fourth spell each turn, draw a card.

card.name: Valgavoth's Harbinger
card.text: When this creature enters, you may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield, it gains haste until end of turn. Return it to your hand at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: Second Sun's Acolyte
card.text: When this creature enters, draw two cards, then put a card from your hand on top of your library.

card.name: Remand
card.text: Counter target spell. If that spell is countered this way, put it into its owner's hand instead of into that player's graveyard. Draw a card.

card.name: Tourach's Bargain
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a nonland card. Draw two cards.

card.name: Unhallowed Exchange
card.text: Each player sacrifices a creature, then return up to one target creature card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Abyssal Ledger
card.text: Whenever one or more cards leave your graveyard, put a void counter on this enchantment. Remove three counters from this enchantment: Draw a card.

card.name: Shivan Channeler
card.text: {T}: Add {R}.

card.name: Wilds Expansion
card.text: Return target land card from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Mulch Channeler
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. Whenever a land is put into your graveyard from the battlefield, untap this creature.

card.name: Entropy Alignment
card.text: Target player discards a card. Target player mills two cards. Target player draws a card.

card.name: Divine Return
card.text: Return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield. Miracle—Discard a card (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Wilderness Reflection
card.text: Whenever a land you control enters, you may have it become a copy of another target land you control until end of turn.

card.name: Loam Familiar
card.text: When this creature enters, mill two cards. You may play nonbasic lands from your graveyard.

card.name: Dream Fragment
card.text: You may cast this spell from your graveyard or from exile.

card.name: Cosmic Repurposer
card.text: Exile a creature you control: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card, you may cast it without paying it's mana cost. Put the rest of the revealed cards onto the bottom of your library in a random order. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Deathdrinker Oni
card.text: Deathtouch Whenever a nonland permanent you control leaves the battlefield, add {B}, until end of turn you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

card.name: Second Opinion
card.text: Change the target of a spell or ability with a single target.

card.name: Adrift Archive
card.text: When this artifact enters, scry 1, then draw a card. Whenever a creature you control enters, if it entered or was cast from your graveyard, sacrifice this artifact, when you do, scry 1, then draw a card.

card.name: Soft Copy
card.text: You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield except it has base power and toughness 1/1.

card.name: Timely Intervention
card.text: Target creature you control gains indestructible until end of turn. If that creature has summoning sickness, draw a card.

card.name: Bauble Salvager
card.text: When this creature enters, return up to one target artifact or enchantment with mana value one or less from your graveyard to the battlefield.

card.name: Conjurer's Trinket
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Exile target creature you control, then return it to the battlefield under its owner's control. When this artifact is put into the graveyard from the battlefield, draw a card.

card.name: Spell Rehearsal
card.text: Target instant or sorcery card in your graveyard gains flashback until end of turn, the flashback cost is equal to its mana cost.

card.name: Veto
card.text: Counter target spells unless its controller pays {2}. Players can't cast noncreature spells this turn.

card.name: Elenda's Visionary
card.text: Lifelink Whenever you gain life for the first time each turn, create a tapped 1/1 white Vampire Soldier creature token.

card.name: Squire of the Realm
card.text: Adamant — This creature enters with two additional +1/+1 counters on it if at least three white mana was spent to cast it. This creature enters with two additional +1/+1 counters on it if it was cast for its miracle cost. Miracle {2}{W} (You may cast this card for its miracle cost when you draw it if it's the first card you drew this turn.)

card.name: Cottorus, Hundred-Handed
card.text: Reach Cottorus can block an additional two creatures each combat.
